title: dolichos sericeus subsp. formosus
intro: Dolichos sericeus subsp. formosus, also known as the silky dolichos or Chinese dolichos, is a perennial vine native to East Asia, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of Dolichos sericeus subsp. formosus include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to treat various health conditions, and its extracts are also used in modern pharmaceutical applications.
